title: townsendia condensata
intro: Townsendia condensata, also known as dense Townsendia or dense Townsend's daisy, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and dense foliage. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which provide anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that contribute to its various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating digestive issues. Townsendia condensata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory and digestive problems.
